message:
test: comprehensive cross-surface parity expansion, DROPIN-174 traceability, and e2e triage improvements

cross_surface_parity.rs — major expansion (+600 lines):
- Replace unsafe env-var-based env_precedence tests with safe
  cli_flag_combinations tests (provider/model flags, both together,
  each without the other) — eliminates unsound set_var/remove_var calls
- Update stop_reason fields from Option<String> to StopReason enum
  throughout session_invariants and message_serde_invariants modules
- Fix text_signature serialization assertions: "text_signature" →
  "textSignature" to match actual camelCase serde output
- Add 8 new config type tests: compaction round-trip, retry settings,
  extension policy profiles, repair policy modes, thinking budgets,
  image settings, all-subconfigs-absent default assertion
- Add StopReason parity module: camelCase serialization for all 5
  variants, round-trip, default-is-Stop, unknown-variant-fails
- Add error_structure module: provider/tool error field preservation,
  SessionNotFound path preservation, all string error variants,
  HTTP code scenarios, Send+Sync assertion
- Add cli_subcommands module: config --show/--paths/--json, doctor
  --fix, install --local, search, list, update-index, no-subcommand
- Add cli_utilities module: file_args @-ref extraction, message_args
  exclusion, enabled_tools default/subset/no-tools, edge cases

json_mode_parity.rs — formatting and type safety fixes:
- Extract AutoCompactionCase type alias for readability
- Fix integer literal type in auto_retry_exponential_backoff: use
  explicit u64 conversion instead of `as u64` cast
- Rustfmt normalization: multi-line closure formatting for info_ctx
  calls, consistent array access formatting

DROPIN-174 parity traceability (4 new tests across 4 files):
- config_precedence: DROPIN-142 config surface requirement trace
- error_handling: DROPIN-144 error surface requirement trace
- main_cli_selection: DROPIN-141 CLI surface requirement trace
- session_conformance: DROPIN-143 session surface requirement trace
Each test emits a structured parity log line with requirement_id,
surface, and parity_requirement context fields, then validates the
JSONL output round-trips correctly.

e2e_artifact_retention_triage.rs:
- Add tests for run_all VCR cassette mismatch classification, lint
  failure classification, remediation hints, and timeline events
- Add tests for full suite gate coverage threshold, logging/flake
  control gates, and reproduce command metadata

e2e_replay_bundle_validation.rs:
- Add test for deterministic triage diff ordering (sorted section keys,
  sorted workflow_id, sorted diagnostics)

suite_classification.toml:
- Register new suites: cross_surface_parity, json_mode_parity, sdk_api,
  sdk_unit, graduated_rollout_integration_sec72, sdk_integration,
  e2e_golden_corpus

full_suite_gate/replay_bundle.json:
- Update generated_at, correlation_id, rustc_version, cargo_target_dir,
  git_sha to reflect current main state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
